footer.description: Discover who we are and the gaming passion behind GameHub.
footer.claimsDescription: Register a claim or complaint about your GameHub experience.

home.title: GameHub: The ultimate arsenal for true gamers.
home.intro: Welcome to GameHub, the meeting point created by gamers, for gamers. We do more than sell consoles, video games and accessories; we fuel your geek side with the best collectibles. Level up your experience and dive into your next great adventure.
home.intro2: A passion for video games is what drives GameHub. Here you will find the latest releases, classic gems and must-have accessories for every player. Join our gaming community and take your experience to the next level with GameHub.

accessories.title: Accessories Catalog
accessories.noResults: No accessories found with these filters.

consolesList.noResults: No consoles found with the selected filters.

whoWeAre.heading: Who are we?
whoWeAre.text: GameHub is a web platform designed to provide an interactive experience in the world of video games, featuring sections such as home, games, consoles, accessories and login, allowing users to explore varied and relevant content all in one place. Our goal is to make it easier to navigate and search for information, organize personal preferences, and offer a modern experience for the gaming community.

missionVision.missionText: To provide users with a modern and intuitive platform where they can explore video games, consoles and accessories, offering an organized, accessible and appealing experience.
missionVision.visionText: To become a reference platform for the gaming community, incorporating new technologies and innovative features that allow for an increasingly complete and personalized experience.

items.title: Technological innovation:
items.text: we seek to continuously improve our solutions through new technologies.

items.title: Teamwork:
items.text: we encourage collaboration and communication among team members.

items.title: Commitment to quality:
items.text: we develop efficient and easy-to-use features.

items.title: Responsibility:
items.text: we fulfill the goals and tasks assigned during the project.

items.title: Continuous improvement:
items.text: we constantly look for opportunities to optimize the platform.

members.name: Renato Alejandro Osorio Cama
members.description: Oversees the overall development, coordinates the team's activities, and participates in database design and the development of core features.

members.name: Carlos Ernesto Gonzales Solórzano
members.description: Responsible for Supabase configuration, authentication implementation, registration and login, as well as developing the system's interfaces and features.

members.name: Caleb Isaac Alvarez Ysmodés
members.description: In charge of designing and implementing the user interface, the initial setup of the React project, and the visual adaptation of the system.

members.name: Karol Nieves Huamani Espinoza
members.description: Responsible for database development, integration of features such as cart and favorites, and participation in system testing.

members.name: Hilmer Kharoll Jauregui Canchanya
members.description: In charge of identifying system requirements, defining features, and participating in the development of interfaces and application navigation.

items.question: What is GameHub?
items.answer: GameHub is a web platform focused on the gaming world where users can explore video games, consoles and accessories.

items.question: Do I need to register?
items.answer: Not necessarily. However, some features require authentication for a more personalized experience.

items.question: What products does GameHub offer?
items.answer: Video games, consoles and accessories related to gaming entertainment.

items.question: What technologies does GameHub use?
items.answer: React, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase and PostgreSQL.

items.title: Platform use
items.text: GameHub is intended for informational and demonstration purposes within the academic project developed by the team.

items.title: Information responsibility
items.text: We strive to keep information about the video games, consoles and accessories shown on the platform up to date.

items.title: Copyright
items.text: Images, brands and trade names belong to their respective owners.

items.title: Modifications
items.text: The development team may update features, design and content in future versions of the system.

claims.title: Complaints Book
claims.intro: At GameHub, we listen to every request to improve the shopping experience and service. Complete the form with your information and the details of your case.
claims.privacy: The information submitted will only be used to review and respond to your claim or complaint.
claims.differenceText: Claim: dissatisfaction related to a product or service. Complaint: dissatisfaction with the service received.

validation.name: The name must contain letters only.
validation.document: The DNI must contain exactly 8 numbers.
validation.phone: The phone number must have 9 numbers and start with 9.
